channel.title: kubernetes on keruen's Security Blog
channel.description: Recent content in kubernetes on keruen's Security Blog

item.title: HackTheBox: Steamcloud
item.description: Content recon exploiting kubernetes recon nmap report 22/tcp 2379/tcp 2380/tcp 8443/tcp 10250/tcp exploiting kubernetes curl -k https://10.10.11.133:8433 { "kind": "Status", "apiVersion": "v1", "metadata": { }, "status": "Failure", "message": "forbidden: User \"system:anonymous\" cannot get path \"/\"", "reason": "Forbidden", "details": { }, "code": 403 } curl -k https://10.10.11.133:10250/pods
